name: Wolf Simulator Forest Hunt 3D
description: Explore nature as a wild animal and raise a family in the wilderness in Wildcraft, a new RPG adventure set in a huge 3D landscape! Start your adventure as a wolf, fox, lynx and more, and take your family on a new adventure. Play with friends in multiplayer games and form animal families to protect your cubs from enemies. Unlock new animal breeds as your family legacy grows in Wildcraft! Online Multiplayer Simulator Compete with players from all around the World! The wilderness is never empty. Meet other wolves in real time and conquer the forest!
instructions: use mouse LMB hit WASD E eat F drink P pick Space Jump ESC pause menu TAB Objective
